texto: He came to chat with me the day of my being discharged, advising that I not stay at the dog fight until the last dog was dead. I was a kid and made little counsel. Now that I am a bigger kid, I see the value--belatedly--added. Yet I also see the loss of life in the protecting, first of all, of oneself. Better to give oneself away. Dead f*ck the dog and so on.
explicacao: Citação de Gordon Lish sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “He came to chat with me the day of my being discharged, advising that I not stay at the dog fight…” articula reflexao, character, honesty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e honesty.
